The Principal Competitive Intelligence Analyst will lead competitive strategy for Automation and AI-driven security initiatives, applying structured analytic techniques to forecast AI evolution and validate competitor claims. Responsibilities • Apply SATs (such as Alternative Futures Analysis) to forecast the evolution of AI in the SOC.
